sentences.arabic: زَرَعَتْ سَارَةُ بَذْرَةً صَغِيرَةً فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sara je posijala malo sjeme u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Sara planted a small seed in the garden.

sentences.translation: Zalijevala je svaki dan ujutro i uveče.
sentences.translationEn: She watered it every morning and evening.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ رَأَتْ وَرَقَةً خَضْرَاءَ صَغِيرَةً تَخْرُجُ مِنَ الأَرْضِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon sedmice je ugledala mali zeleni listić koji izlazi iz zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: After a week she saw a small green leaf coming out of the ground.

sentences.translation: Veoma se obradovala i rekla: «Ja sam uspjela!»
sentences.translationEn: She was very happy and said: «I did it!»

sentences.arabic: نَمَتِ الشَّجَرَةُ بَبْطْءٍ وَأَصْبَحَتْ مَكَانًا لِلطُّيُورِ.
sentences.translation: Stablo je polako raslo i postalo je mjesto za ptice.
sentences.translationEn: The tree grew slowly and became a place for birds.
